content.problemStatement: You are given an array $arr$ consisting of $N$ integers. Your task is to compute the sum of the squares of the elements in the array, and then return the result modulo $10^9+7$.
content.inputFormat:
The first line contains one integer $T$
 ($1≤T≤1000$
) — the number of test cases.

The second line of each test case contains one integer n
 ($1≤N≤10^4$
) — the length of the array $arr$
.

The third line of each test case contains $N$
 integers $arr_1,arr_2,…,arr_n$
 ($1≤|arr_i|≤10^{18}$
) — array $arr$
.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output on a new line the sum of square of elements of the array, modulo $10^9 + 7$.
